2261952350.detail_text: - The Gala No-Dust Broom ensures no dust or debris is left behind, unlike new grass brooms that shed during initial use. - Made from special grass-like fiber with over 5000 touchpoints, providing superior cleaning performance. - Broom Length: 90 cm including handle . The Gala No Dust Grass Broom, available as a single piece, is a specialized cleaning tool designed for sweeping and maintaining clean environments. It is specifically crafted to prevent the release of dust particles during sweeping, providing a cleaner and more efficient cleaning experience. The term "grass broom" refers to the broom's bristles, which are made from grass materials. The grass bristles are known for their flexibility, durability, and their ability to effectively capture dust and debris. The "No Dust" feature of the Gala Grass Broom indicates that it has been designed to minimize the amount of dust stirred up while sweeping. This feature is achieved through the tightly bound and interwoven grass bristles that prevent dust particles from escaping during sweeping. As a result, the broom helps to maintain a cleaner and healthier environment by reducing airborne dust. The Gala No Dust Grass Broom is typically used for sweeping various types of floors, including tiled, wooden, or concrete surfaces. Its grass bristles efficiently collect and trap dirt, dust, and small debris, leaving the floor clean and tidy. The broom is commonly used both indoors and outdoors, making it suitable for sweeping in households, commercial spaces, gardens, and other areas where cleanliness is desired.

PVC
Transparent Option
Nritile
Black, Blue and White Option


TPE the lowest grade ( thus the cheapest)
PVC middle grade
Nritile the highest grade( thus the expensive)

Recommendation:
If you are dealing with food only,
TPE is sufficient.

If you are washing toilet, motorcycle, machineries,
try to get at least Vinyl

Nitrile can be used for the 2 purpose above, but it is abit overkill.
Nitrile glove is usually used in medical industry due to their high puncture resistance against chemicals.
Certain government bodies front office ( eg ICA) are using Nitrile Glove now to prevent micro droplets to reach the skin on the hand itself.


Our gloves are approved for non-sterile medical applications. They provide dependable barrier protection from bodily fluids, blood borne pathogens, and other contaminants.
Vinyl is a synthetic material made from polyvinyl chloride (PVC). It helps prevent allergic reactions to latex proteins.

[Product color]: transparent.
[Size]: S / M / L / XL
[Quantity]: 100 pcs / box.

[Advantages of dust-free PVC gloves]:
1. Dust-free PVC gloves have excellent chemical resistance, acid resistance, alkali resistance and oil resistance.
2. Dust-free PVC gloves have strong tensile strength, puncture resistance, and are not easy to break.
3. The dust-free PVC gloves have good air tightness and can effectively prevent the dust from being emitted outward.
4. Dust-free PVC gloves have no silicon component and have certain antistatic properties, which are suitable for the production needs of the electronics industry.
5.Dust-free PVC gloves are comfortable to wear, and will not cause skin tension when worn for a long time, which is conducive to blood circulation.
6. Dust-free PVC gloves are non-toxic, harmless, free of amino compounds and other harmful substances, and rarely cause allergies.

<< Premium quality: Constructed from Nitrile, which is nontoxic, odourless and eco-friendly.
<< Wide application: Suitable for paint, car repair and other applications.
<< Compact design: Lightweight, it is easy to carry.

TPE the lowest grade ( thus the cheapest)
PVC middle grade
Nritile the highest grade( thus the expensive)

Recommendation:
If you are dealing with food only,
TPE is sufficient.

If you are washing toilet, motorcycle, machineries,
try to get at least Vinyl

Nitrile can be used for the 2 purpose above, but it is abit overkill.
Nitrile glove is usually used in medical industry due to their high puncture resistance against chemicals.
Certain government bodies front office ( eg ICA) are using Nitrile Glove now to prevent micro droplets to reach the skin on the hand itself.


Our gloves are approved for non-sterile medical applications. They provide dependable barrier protection from bodily fluids, blood borne pathogens, and other contaminants.
Vinyl is a synthetic material made from polyvinyl chloride (PVC). It helps prevent allergic reactions to latex proteins.

[Quantity]: 100 pcs / box.

[Advantages of dust-free PVC gloves]:
1. Dust-free PVC gloves have excellent chemical resistance, acid resistance, alkali resistance and oil resistance.
2. Dust-free PVC gloves have strong tensile strength, puncture resistance, and are not easy to break.
3. The dust-free PVC gloves have good air tightness and can effectively prevent the dust from being emitted outward.
4. Dust-free PVC gloves have no silicon component and have certain antistatic properties, which are suitable for the production needs of the electronics industry.
5.Dust-free PVC gloves are comfortable to wear, and will not cause skin tension when worn for a long time, which is conducive to blood circulation.
6. Dust-free PVC gloves are non-toxic, harmless, free of amino compounds and other harmful substances, and rarely cause allergies.
